overview: Second is an AI chief of staff app for startup founders. It surfaces what actually matters — your daily briefing, the 3 decisions needing your attention, and protected focus time — in a single minimal dark-mode feed called the War Room.
features: War Room briefing card with revenue pulse, top risks, calendar conflicts, and one uncomfortable question
Decision Inbox showing the 3 decisions that need you today, with AI-drafted auto-replies for everything else
Focus Mode with calendar blocking and mock auto-decline for low-leverage meetings
Delegate button on every item that drafts a Slack message to your team
Dark mode minimal design inspired by Superhuman and Linear
Mock data for Stripe, Slack, Gmail, and Google Calendar in v1
